name: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Mirum Pharmaceuticals is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming the treatment of rare diseases. It has three approved medicines: LIVMARLI (maralixibat), CHOLBAM (cholic acid) capsules, and CTEXLI (chenodiol) tablets.
sellsTo: Rare disease patients with cholestatic liver diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming the treatment of rare diseases.

catalysts.event: Announce topline results from VISTAS Phase 2b study in PSC
catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce top-line results from the VISTAS study in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment of VANTAGE Phase 2b study in PBC
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment of our VANTAGE Phase 2b clinical trial in PBC is expected to be completed in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Announce topline results from AZURE-1 and AZURE-4 Phase 3 studies in HDV
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the 24-week trial period of both AZURE-1 and -4 and announce topline results in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Announce topline results from EXPAND Phase 3 study
catalysts.sentence: We expect topline results from the EXPAND study in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Announce topline data from BLOOM Phase 2 study of MRM-3379 in FXS
catalysts.sentence: We are currently enrolling patients in the BLOOM Phase 2 clinical study of MRM-3379 in FXS and expect topline data in 2027.
On January 23, 2026, we completed the acquisition of Bluejay Therapeutics, Inc. ( Bluejay and such acquisition, the Bluejay Acquisition ) and its lead product candidate brelovitug (BJT-778).

tamClaims.claim: Greater than $500 million market opportunity for Livmarli in ALGS
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the prevalent patient population in the United States and Europe is approximately 4,000 - 5,500 pediatric ALGS patients, which, based on our current expectations and beliefs, represents a greater than $500.0 million market opportunity.

tamClaims.claim: More than $1 billion total addressable market for volixibat in PSC and PBC
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate a worldwide total addressable market for volixibat in PSC and PBC to be more than $1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: More than $1 billion total addressable market for MRM-3379 in FXS
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there are approximately 50,000 males in the U.S. and Europe with FXS with an estimated worldwide total addressable market for more than $1 billion.
